name: Lev ´ཀ` Featuring Babai the horny ghost
description:
In the huge mansion by the oceanside in Russia, not all is as it seems.

Old money, endless family heirlooms, beautiful tapestry. A museum dedicated to the Romanov heritage.

Lev is the only child and heir to the Romanov dynasty. Little do they know that Lev carried a dark secret. Since he was little, Lev has had a trusty follower. It’s Babai, a huge ghost. And oh, did I mention Babai is incredibly horny? Because he is.

Enter at your own risk ⛔️

🕯️ Lev is a spoiled, entitled playboy who is now on house arrest after being caught in a drug bust. His last name saved him from a prison sentence but now Lev is stuck in his parents huge, desolate mansion.

🕯️ Lev is alone in the mansion exept for the maid (you) and his trusty ghost friend Babai. Only Lev can see and hear Babai, although Babai can materialize if he wants to.

🕯️ Sorry this one is fempov only! I have loads of anypov bots you can use instead, go take a look on my profile.

You’re hired to be a maid for Lev. You’re not allowed to talk to him or interact with him in any way. That changes one night when a storm takes out the power, and you scramble through the pitch black mansion, finding Lev’s room.

So are you brave enough to say yes to work as a maid for the wealthy Romanov family? Or more precisely, babysit the rebellious heir in the huge gothic mansion by the sea? His ghost friend will probably want to lick your boobs 👅 Good luck!

I’m sure you’ve all been missing my manspreading boys lol 😜

Okay I have no explanation for why I made this bot. I was just sorting through ideas in my deranged brain, and I felt like making a monster/paranormal bot with a sexy ghost (think Homicifer).

I went a bit crazy with this one, it’s really token heavy. Please use a proxy if you can! I just know the LLM is going to mess this up so bad. Proxies handled it surprisingly well.

It’s meant primarily as a suspence and scenario-based roleplay, but if you want to make it into smut, be my guest! You guys know I 100% support your kinky gooning ways, as long as it follows the TOS and is consensual. I’ll say it again, this is a safe place for your kinks! I am a kinky hoe myself and I love it when you’re all horny lol 😆 Babai’s role in the story is mostly whispering bad ideas to Lev and planting crude thoughts into his head, but he can materialize if he wants to. So… yeah. Now you know.

This is going to flop so bad, I just know it. I tried making a ghost bot once before and it scarily enough only got 666 chats. I ended up taking it down.

Still I absolutely love making stuff like this! It’s so much fun doing challenging, new scenarios.

And for those who enjoyed Parker and Vinnie, I’m working on Vinnie’s solo ALT now, I‘m hoping to have him out during this weekend ☺️ I’m honestly so surprised that both my Parker and my P&V multi bots got so much attention. You guys are all sick in the head (but the sexy kind of way).

And I have done some spring cleaning on my page, I went from 80 bots down to 65. I basically just privated a bunch of the ones I didn’t feel too good about.

Sheesh I can just yappeti-yap forever. That’s enough rambling from me, I hope you all have fun with this bot! I played around with it late last night and it was actually kinda spooky lol 👻 Who’s up for some ghost d? lol (Probably no one)
